languages.text: "Самое важное — выяснилось, что Погонщицы охотятся на {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеров{/g}, и их привлекают варп-активные зоны. Вероятно, эти твари были созданы специально для изничтожения всего, что проявляет варп-активность. Это можно использовать против них".

traits.locale_text: "Самое важное — выяснилось, что Погонщицы охотятся на {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеров{/g}, и их привлекают варп-активные зоны. Вероятно, эти твари были созданы специально для изничтожения всего, что проявляет варп-активность. Это можно использовать против них".

languages.text: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g}, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."
languages.original_text: "Самое важное — выяснилось, что Погонщицы охотятся на {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеров{/g}, и их привлекают варп-активные зоны. Вероятно, эти твари были созданы специально для изничтожения всего, что проявляет варп-активность. Это можно использовать против них".

traits.locale_text: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on psykers, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."

"The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on psykers, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."

"The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on psykers, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."

languages.text: 「最も重要な発見は、ドルーバーは{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}サイカー{/g}を襲い、ワープ活動のある地域に引き寄せられることだ。これらの生物は、おそらくワープ活動を示すものを破壊するために作られたのだろう。これを利用すれば、彼らに打ち勝てるだろう」
languages.original_text: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g}, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."

traits.locale_text: 「最も重要な発見は、ドルーバーはサイカーを襲い、ワープ活動のある地域に引き寄せられることだ。これらの生物は、おそらくワープ活動を示すものを破壊するために作られたのだろう。これを利用すれば、彼らに打ち勝てるだろう。」
「最も重要な発見は、ドルーバーは{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}サイカー{/g}を襲い、ワープ活動のある地域に引き寄せられることだ。これらの生物は、おそらくワープ活動を示すものを破壊するために作られたのだろう。これを利用すれば、彼らに打ち勝てるだろう」

languages.text: «Su descubrimiento más significativo es que los Pastores dan caza a los {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psíquicos{/g} y se ven atraídos por las zonas con actividad disforme. Es probable que estas criaturas se crearan para destruir toda amenaza de la disformidad. Podemos usar esa especialización contra ellas».
languages.original_text: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g}, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."

traits.locale_text: «Su descubrimiento más significativo es que los Pastores dan caza a los {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psíquicos{/g} y se ven atraídos por las zonas con actividad disforme. Es probable que estas criaturas se crearan para destruir toda amenaza de la disformidad. Podemos usar esa especialización contra ellas».

languages.text: “最关键的发现是：拒生花以{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}灵能者{/g}为食，并会被亚空间活性区域所吸引。这些生物很可能是被专门制造出来，用以摧毁任何有亚空间活性的目标。我们可以反过来利用这一点。”
languages.original_text: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g}, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."

traits.locale_text: “最关键的发现是：拒生花以{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}灵能者{/g}为食，并会被亚空间活性区域所吸引。这些生物很可能是被专门制造出来，用以摧毁任何有亚空间活性的目标。我们可以反过来利用这一点。”

languages.text: "Die wichtigste Erkenntnis ist der Umstand, dass die Treiber Jagd auf {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}Psioniker{/g} machen und von warpaktiven Bereichen angezogen werden. Diese Kreaturen wurden vermutlich geschaffen, um alles zu zerstören, das Warpaktivitäten aufweist. Das können wir gegen sie verwenden."
languages.original_text: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g}, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."

traits.locale_text: "Die wichtigste Erkenntnis ist der Umstand, dass die Treiber Jagd auf {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}Psioniker{/g} machen und von warpaktiven Bereichen angezogen werden. Diese Kreaturen wurden vermutlich geschaffen, um alles zu zerstören, das Warpaktivitäten aufweist. Das können wir gegen sie verwenden."

languages.text: "En önemli bulgu, Çobanların {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}ruhsezerleri{/g} avladığı ve öteboyuta duyarlı bölgelere çekildikleri. Bu yaratıklar muhtemelen öteboyut faaliyeti gösteren her şeyi yok etmek için özel olarak yaratılmış. Bunu onlara karşı kullanabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g}, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."

traits.locale_text: "En önemli bulgu, Çobanların {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}ruhsezerleri{/g} avladığı ve öteboyuta duyarlı bölgelere çekildikleri. Bu yaratıklar muhtemelen öteboyut faaliyeti gösteren her şeyi yok etmek için özel olarak yaratılmış. Bunu onlara karşı kullanabiliriz."

languages.text: « Sa principale découverte est que les Chasseurs traquent les {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} et qu'ils sont attirés par les zones d'activité du Warp. Il est probable qu'ils aient été spécifiquement créés pour détruire toute forme d'activité du Warp. Nous pouvons retourner cette caractéristique contre eux. »
languages.original_text: "The most significant finding is that the Drovers prey on {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g}, and they are attracted to warp-active areas. These creatures were probably created specifically to destroy anything that exhibits warp activity. We can use this against them."
